productDisplayName: John Players Men Solid Maroon Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Maroon T-shirt made of 100% cotton knit, has a ribbed collar in navy blue with white and red tipping, three-button chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs in navy blue and white, navy blue and white lines running down the side length and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Crafted from cotton knit, this ribbed T-shirt from john players is designed to offer exemplary comfort and style. The vibrant colours up your energy factor, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on well-toned arms. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a Model statistics of height 6' and shoulders 18"
